{{Infobox character
| name = Doctor Oladyne
| aliases = Oladyne
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Doctor Oladyne]] is a famous [[Aether Technician]] known for synthesizing materials.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c3">''The Pilot'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Doctor Oladyne]] is a massive man who was found in a hangar near his ship.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4">''The Pilot'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Doctor Oladyne]] was surgically implanted with an explosive device.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Doctor Oladyne]] might have had an explosive device installed himself.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
